pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly downloads the Sentinel-2 TCI image from an AWS S3 bucket (sentinel-cogs) to this exact file path.
export_result.sh explicitly parses and checks the existence and XML content of this expected DIMAP file.
export_result.sh explicitly checks the file size, array shape, and unique values of this expected GeoTIFF file.
task.json description explicitly instructs the agent to configure the Generic Region Merging tool with the Baatz & Schäpe algorithm.
task.json description explicitly instructs the agent to use a Scale Parameter of 20.0.
task.json description explicitly instructs the agent to use a Shape Parameter of 0.1.
task.json description explicitly instructs the agent to use a Compactness Parameter of 0.5.

privileged_info_summary: The target data is a real Sentinel-2 L2A True Color Image (TCI) from December 2020 (tile 31TGM), downloaded directly from a public AWS S3 bucket to /home/ga/snap_data/sentinel2_tci.tif. The task requires exporting two segmented products: a BEAM-DIMAP file to /home/ga/snap_exports/field_segments.dim, and a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/field_segments.tif. The expected segmentation tool is Generic Region Merging using the Baatz & Schäpe algorithm, with scale set to 20.0, shape to 0.1, and compactness to 0.5, matching the explicit instructions given in the task description.
